name: Blind Dice Courier
description: Track a labelled die's hidden orientation while rolling it through face-locked gates.
natural_language: Roll the sealed die-crate through all five face gates and deliver it. Its orientation is visible before the first roll and only at sparse scanner tiles.

metadata.notes: Every legal keyboard move performs a real labelled-die orientation transition across an 18x11 warehouse; five barriers independently test the resulting top face and only four sparse scanners reveal state.
